description: You are a Healthcare Facilities Planner converting a residential building shell into a 4-bed Polysomnography (Sleep Study) Clinic. The building shell is open in Sweet Home 3D with existing exterior walls and some interior boundaries. Partition the space to define at least 4 individual patient sleep rooms and 1 centralized technician observation/control room, ensuring all rooms and restrooms have doors for privacy. Furnish the sleep rooms with a total of at least 4 beds, 4 nightstands, and 4 ambient lamps. The tech control room must be equipped with at least 2 workstations, 2 office chairs, and 4 monitors or computers. The reception area requires at least 4 seats and a desk, and restrooms must include at least 2 toilets and 2 sinks. Annotate the
